key.name: install-path
key.description: Directory where downloaded games are saved. Supports ~ for home directory.

key.name: download-concurrency
key.description: Number of simultaneous downloads allowed. Higher values use more bandwidth.

key.name: view-mode
key.description: Display mode for the game catalog: grid or list.

key.name: wine-path
key.description: Full path to the Wine or Proton binary. Leave empty for auto-detection.

key.name: adaptive-concurrency
key.description: Dynamically adjust the number of concurrent downloads based on measured per-connection speed.

key.name: speed-limit
key.description: Maximum download speed in bytes per second. 0 = unlimited.

key.name: enabled-sources
key.summary: Comma-separated list of enabled source IDs
key.description: Source IDs (fitgirl,dodi,steamrip,...) that are currently enabled. Empty = all enabled.

key.name: first-run-complete
key.description: Whether the first-run setup wizard has been completed.

key.name: webdav-url
key.description: URL of the WebDAV server for cloud save sync.

key.name: cloud-save-enabled
key.description: Automatically back up game saves to WebDAV on game exit.

key.name: debrid-provider
key.description: Debrid provider to use: realdebrid, alldebrid, premiumize, or empty for none.

key.name: debrid-api-key
key.description: API key for the configured debrid service.

key.name: igdb-client-id
key.description: Client ID for Twitch/IGDB API access.

key.name: igdb-client-secret
key.description: Client secret for Twitch/IGDB API access.

key.name: steamgriddb-api-key
key.description: API key for SteamGridDB. Not required for basic cover lookups.
